description:
As a registered user
  I want to book an event
  So that I can reserve tickets and attend the event

parameters.name: message
parameters.value: WebDriver is not initialized. Please check CucumberHooks @Before setup.

steps.name: And I enter registered email address and password
And I click on any available event card
Set text Sydney Harber on By.xpath: //input[@id='customerName']
Then I should see the "Your tickets are reserved." message
